subcodes.first_line: O kind friends! Though ye dwell in the lands of the East and we abide in the realm of Rome and the regions of the West, yet in the feast of oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان هر چند در کشور خاورید و ما در بوم روم و زمین باختر ولی در بزم یگانگی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement
